details: Leading the backend effort, building Go services focused on keeping things simple, scalable, and manageable by a small team.
Driving technical direction for backend systems.
Built AWS infrastructure for services across Splitting Point's Roblox titles.
Working with an AI-assisted development workflow - not generating code blindly, but using AI as a thinking partner alongside my own judgement.
Maintained and extended legacy IIS applications in C#, reverse-engineering undocumented workflows to ship features without breaking things.
Helped design the replacement platform in modern .NET while keeping the legacy system running.
On-call for production incidents across systems outside my squad's scope.
Maintained a distributed TypeScript microservices ecosystem across a team of 10-20 developers.
Built integrations with third-party vendors and legacy platforms, including data pipelines to clean and transform incoming datasets.
Grew significantly as an engineer here; the scale and process forced me to understand what kind of developer I wanted to be.
Designed, developed, and published raygun4reactnative - a React Native library for crash reporting and real-user monitoring.
